ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Eau, ravioli 27% (semoule de _blé_ dur, eau, viande bovine, chapelure (dont _gluten_), carotte, sel, oignons 0,1%, huile de colza), purée de tomate 15%, oignons 3,5%, viande bovine, sel, amidon, basilic.
